movie.actors: Alec Baldwin, Steve Buscemi, Jimmy Kimmel, Lisa Kudrow
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 1 win & 19 nominations.
movie.plot: A suit-wearing, briefcase-carrying baby pairs up with his 7-year old brother to stop the dastardly plot of the CEO of Puppy Co.
movie.title: The Boss Baby
movie.writer: Michael McCullers, Marla Frazee (based on the book by)
